overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a futuristic Yaiba Kusanagi-style motorcycle parked in a neon-lit cyberpunk alley. The camera slowly pans left across the scene as a character enters from the right and stands with arms crossed, gradually revealing a green arcade machine and gritty industrial wall details.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk back alley with parked motorcycle

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left across the neon-lit alley, focusing on the futuristic motorcycle

notable_agents.action: futuristic black motorcycle with glowing green wheel accents parked against the pink wall

entered.detail: sleek black motorcycle with neon green rim lights and exposed engine
corrugated metal wall painted magenta with industrial piping
bright yellow automated kiosk against the back wall
large cylindrical structural column painted blue
grid of fluorescent and neon tube lights emitting purple and green glow

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a parked futuristic motorcycle in a narrow cyberpunk alley. Neon lights from the ceiling cast purple and green reflections on the polished concrete floor. The camera slowly pans left, revealing industrial pink walls and a yellow vending machine in the background.

events.description: cyberpunk character enters from the right and walks to center frame, crossing arms
green neon-lit arcade machine enters the left side of frame as camera continues panning

agents.ego_description: continuing slow leftward pan to explore the environment while keeping the character in view

notable_agents.action: male character with cybernetic arm implants standing with arms crossed, looking toward the camera

entered.detail: wall covered in green spray-painted graffiti tags and street art
large black electrical equipment cabinet with warning labels
retro-futuristic vending machine with green neon trim and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: A cyberpunk character enters and stands in the center of the alley with arms crossed. The camera continues its slow leftward pan, causing the yellow vending machine to exit the frame right while a green neon arcade machine enters from the left. The motorcycle remains visible but shifts to the far left as the gritty graffiti-covered walls become prominent on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan through a neon-lit cyberpunk alley that shifts focus from a futuristic vehicle to a brooding character and industrial surroundings. It begins on a parked motorcycle, where purple and green ceiling lights cast vibrant reflections across a polished concrete floor. As the camera glides left, it passes industrial pink walls and a yellow vending machine before a cyberpunk character enters the frame to stand with arms crossed. The movement continues, causing the vending machine to exit the view as a green neon arcade machine emerges from the left. The scene finally settles with the motorcycle shifting to the far edge of the frame, bringing the gritty, graffiti-covered walls into prominent view.
